policy: Pass requires at least four coherent top-five results and no unrelated-scene result in positions 1-3. Missing queries and junk/seed variants fail.

preview_disclosure: All 100 locked-result Deezer preview URLs returned as available and the actual ranked metadata was inspected. No claim of human audible playback is made.
